title: Epic Changer
description: The mod that helps you with Epic Fight battle mode.
body:
## EPIC CHANGER

 

 

Summary:

 

- Do you like mining? Do you like fighting? Do you like use Epic Fight Mod?

  If you answer is yes let me place you on a casual situation. Imagine that you are mining in your mine, all normally as always. Suddenly an enemy

  gets in front of you, you get your sword and try to attack; Oh surprise! you were on mining mode :( 

 

- Well, this mod changes automatically into battle or mining mode depending on the tool type you are holding. Example: Have a pickaxe on hand you turn on mining mode, have a not a tool you are in battle mode. This mod have no conflicts with Epic Fight, you can change mode when you have a pickaxe after get changed automatically. It also includes mod configs to define which types of tool with make you change to mining mode. 

 

### This mod without Epic Fight does nothing.

 

- My Discord server: [Discord](https://discord.gg/pqwaNxmy)
- My Patreon if you want to donate [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/FelinaMods)
 

 Enjoy :3
